title: Defiance NASDAQ 100 Lightningspread Income ETF announces bi-weekly distribution of $0.1807
content:
Defiance NASDAQ 100 Lightningspread Income ETF (QLDY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/QLDY]) announces bi-weekly distribution of $0.1807, 1.80% higher from the prior week's distribution of $0.1775.

The annual distribution rate is 40.00%.

Payable 25-06-2026; for shareholders of record 24-06-2026; ex-div 24-06-2026.

content:
